children.text: The full leather set gives you +4.5 to the armour level (you can see this level under your health level). It can also be dyed into different colours.

Ingredients: 5 items of leather

Leather cap gives +0.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 8 items of leather

Leather Tunic gives +1.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 7 items of leather

Leather Pants give +1 to the armour level

Ingredients: 4 items of leather

Leather Boots give +0.5 to the armour level
The full iron set gives you +8.5 to the armour level (you can see this level under your health level). Iron set is the most commonly-worn set in the game.

Ingredients: 5 iron ingots

Iron Helmet gives +1 to the armour level

Ingredients: 8 iron ingots

Iron Chestplate gives +3 to the armour level

Ingredients: 7 iron ingots

Iron Leggings give +2.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 4 iron ingots

Iron Boots give +1 to the armour level
The full golden set gives you +5.5 to the armour level (you can see this level under your health level)

Ingredients: 5 gold ingots

Golden Helmet gives +1 to the armour level

Ingredients: 8 gold ingots

Golden Chestplate gives +2.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 7 gold ingots

Golden Leggings give +1.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 4 gold ingots

Golden Boots give +0.5 to the armour level
The full diamond set gives you +10 to the armour level (you can see this level under your health level)

Ingredients: 5 diamonds

Diamond Helmet gives +1.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 8 diamonds

Diamond Chestplate gives +4 to the armour level

Ingredients: 7 diamonds

Diamond Leggings give +3 to the armour level

Ingredients: 4 diamonds

Diamond Boots give +1.5 to the armour level
The full chain set gives you +6 to the armour level (you can see this level under your health level). The chain set protects you from lava. It's impossible to craft a chain set in survival.

Ingredients: 5 items of fire

Chain Helmet gives +1 to the armour level

Ingredients: 8 items of fire

Chain Chestplate gives +2.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 7 items of fire

Chain Leggings give +2 to the armour level

Ingredients: 4 items of fire

Chain Boots give +0.5 to the armour level

Ingredients: 6 wood planks, 1 iron ingot

Shields are tools used for protecting the player against attacks.
